name: doudou-digital-human
description: Static pet bundle to desktop runtime vertical slice for a digital desktop companion.

scripts.build:main: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/runtime/preload.cjs dist/src/runtime/preload.cjs && mkdir -p dist/src/app && cp src/app/index.html src/app/styles.css src/app/preload.cjs dist/src/app/
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS= electron dist/src/runtime/main.js --bundle fixtures/pet_bundles/valid_minimal_atlas_pet
scripts.dev:app: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS= electron dist/src/app/main.js
scripts.smoke:runtime: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS= node dist/src/scripts/runtime-smoke.js
scripts.smoke:app: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS= node dist/src/scripts/app-smoke.js
scripts.smoke:app:live: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS= node dist/src/scripts/app-live-smoke.js
